title: Huge Screenshots and Panoramas Mod
description:
Minecraft mod that enables unused screenshot code in the minecraft client

The mod allows taking of screenshots in the .tga format at 36450x17700 pixels
body:
Minecraft mod that enables unused screenshot code in the minecraft client

The mod allows taking of screenshots in the .tga format at 36450x17700 pixels by hitting F7 and Panoramas by hitting F8
